notes: 3.11.72 — AUDIT TOAN APP nguon ty gia (16 o nhap + luong luu + bao cao) theo yeu cau Sep. Diem do duy nhat con lai da va: o ty gia PHI (op-fee-fx, 2 form) — feeCcy ngoai te (SGD/EUR) can ty gia THAP PHAN (1 USD = 1.296 SGD) nhung o format nghin se nuot ('1.296'→1296, cung ho vu phieu SGD). Fix: _opFeeFxInput format thong minh theo dong phi (VND: nghin; ngoai: giu thap phan) + parse dung nhanh + sanity _fxSane confirm khi luu. Cac o khac: form nhap op chuan (quy uoc VND + _opConvert + preview), AR/multi-row chuan, pay-fx/qr-fx/bp1/hd-fxrate la ty gia VND so nghin qua getter unformat — an toan. Bao cao: opTxUsd tu lanh (3.11.66) + opReportUsd frozen + toDisplay/apArToVnd per-record (audit 3.11.64). Rollback=3.10.41.
